title: 46: The iOS App Icon Book - Michael Flarup
description:
Michael Flarup joins the show to talk about his multifaceted design career and the creation and launch of the amazing book celebrating the art form of iOS app icons. Edited by Jonathan Ruiz Links & Show Notes Michael's Twitter
